headline: TASK-078 is the live v6.8 frontier after 6.7.0.

current_state.operating_goal: Advance v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger: make QIF-relevant evidence changes appendable and auditable, so corrected assumptions, contradicted claims, and missing runtime evidence are visible before future review or release decisions.
current_state.next_value_slice: Implement TASK-078 v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger foundation: add the smallest canonical quality-ledger event schema, writer, audit, and negative fixtures that detect missing runtime evidence or contradicted claims. Stop condition: foundation only; do not auto-compute QIF verdicts and do not claim operator validation. QIF boundary: ledger presence is evidence traceability, not semantic truth.

primary_frontier_task.title: v6.8 frontier: executable quality ledger foundation

visible_state.speech_bubble: I need council review before I should execute.
visible_state.next_action: Submit the gate packet to council review before actor execution.

why_now.summary: TASK-078 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 6.7.0 and the runtime is now targeting v6.8.
The current operating goal and next value slice both reinforce TASK-078 as the next bounded operating move.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-078: v6.8 frontier: executable quality ledger foundation
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.
